sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, product_id INT, sales_amount DOUBLE PRECISION, sale_date DATE);
INSERT INTO sales_data (product_id, sales_amount, sale_date) VALUES (1, 100.5, '2023-01-01'), (2, 200.75, '2023-02-01'), (1, 150.25, '2023-01-15');
UPDATE sales_data SET sales_amount = sales_amount * 1.10 WHERE product_id = 1;
SELECT product_id, sys.corr(sales_amount, sales_amount) OVER () as correlation FROM sales_data;
SELECT DISTINCT product_id, sys.corr(sales_amount, sales_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY product_id) as correlation FROM sales_data;
